decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: truncate returns s unchanged when len(s) <= n; otherwise it returns a string whose TOTAL length (visible text plus the single '…' character) is at most n.
The change modifies only the module and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: When shortening it reserves one character for the ellipsis (e.g. s[:n-1] + '…'), so the result length never exceeds n.
